=======

input.new_string: - AH-126: Read-only MCP surface via AWS Bedrock AgentCore Gateway — OpenAPI 3.0 spec (`mcp/openapi-readonly.json`) exposing 18 GET endpoints as MCP tools, with Okta JWT authentication. New `250-agentcore` Terraform stack for Gateway, target, OAuth2 credential provider, and workload identity resources. Spacelift stacks added for dev and prod.

input.command:
gh pr create --title "AH-126: Add read-only MCP surface via AgentCore Gateway" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- OpenAPI 3.0 spec (`mcp/openapi-readonly.json`) exposing 18 read-only GET endpoints as MCP tools, with Okta JWT authentication
- New `250-agentcore` Terraform stack with Gateway, gateway target, OAuth2 credential provider, and workload identity resources
- Spacelift stack definitions added for dev (autodeploy) and prod (manual)

## Notes
- Gateway target resource attribute names are best-effort — may need adjustment after first `terraform plan` against the new provider resources
- Admin API is VPC-private; gateway target may need VPC subnet/SG config to reach it
- `getRunReview` endpoint changed from `text/markdown` to `application/json` for Gateway compatibility — admin API handler will need a corresponding change
- `RunDetail` and `TicketReviewDetail` schemas flattened (no `allOf`) for Gateway compatibility

## Test plan
- [ ] Run `terraform validate` on `250-agentcore` stack
- [ ] Run `terraform plan` and verify resource attributes match provider schema
- [ ] Validate OpenAPI spec loads correctly as a gateway target
- [ ] Verify Okta JWT auth flow works end-to-end via MCP client

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)" --base main
git checkout dev && git stash pop
input.description: Return to dev branch and restore stash
